auto_propose.stdout_preview:
============================================================
🔧 自動修復建議報告 — 2026-04-25 12:04
============================================================

P0 問題：
  P0_current_live_deployment_blocker: 熔斷解除條件仍是唯一即時部署阻塞點
    → 先把即時部署阻塞語義切回熔斷解除條件；在熔斷未解除前，不要把 q15/q35 support 或 floor-gap 當成本輪主阻塞。 最近 50 筆需至少 15 勝，當前 9 勝，還差 6 勝；同時連續虧損必須 < 50。

P1 問題：
  #H_AUTO_MODEL_STABILITY: model stability still needs work (cv=0.6164, cv_std=0.0716, cv_worst=0.5447)
    → 優先比較 support-aware / shrinkage profiles 與 current bucket robustness，避免把治理 blocker 誤當單純 parity 問題。
  #H_AUTO_REGIME_DRIFT: TW-IC 26 vs Global IC 17 — 信號強依賴近期資料
    → 市場 regime 可能已變化; 考慮 regime-gated feature weighting
  P1_execution_venue_readiness_unverified: venue readiness is still unverified
    → Keep per-venue blockers explicitly visible on Dashboard, /lab, and /execution/status until credentials, order ack lifecycle, and fill lifecycle each have runtime-backed proof.
  P1_fin_netflow_auth_blocked: fin_netflow remains source_auth_blocked because COINGLASS_API_KEY is missing
    → Configure COINGLASS_API_KEY, then keep heartbeat collection running until successful ETF-flow snapshots replace auth_missing rows and coverage starts to move.
  P1_leaderboard_recent_window_contract: leaderboard comparable rows are back; keep the recent-window contract stable and cron-safe
    → Keep /api/models/leaderboard and Strategy Lab aligned on latest bounded walk-forward plus the recent-two-year backtest policy; do not regress to placeholder-only or ambiguous backtest windows.
  P1_recent_distribution_pathology_monitoring: recent canonical window 100 rows = distribution_pathology but current live regime is outside the blocker pocket
    → 保留 recent canonical drift 監控與 blocker-window evidence；目前 live predictor 沒有套用 recent pathology guardrail，且 current live regime 不等於 blocker dominant regime，因此降為 P1 監控，不得當成 deployment closure。

📊 資料庫：simulated_win=0.5689, streak=7, age=1.6
📊 IC 概況：global=17/30, tw=26/30
📊 TW 歷史：#fast=26/30, #20260425_15

🔧 自動修復建議報告 — 2026-04-25 12:04

P0 問題：

    → 先把即時部署阻塞語義切回熔斷解除條件；在熔斷未解除前，不要把 q15/q35 support 或 floor-gap 當成本輪主阻塞。 最近 50 筆需至少 15 勝，當前 9 勝，還差 6 勝；同時連續虧損必須 < 50。

P1 問題：
  #H_AUTO_MODEL_STABILITY: model stability still needs work (cv=0.6164, cv_std=0.0716, cv_worst=0.5447)
    → 優先比較 support-aware / shrinkage profiles 與 current bucket robustness，避免把治理 blocker 誤當單純 parity 問題。
  #H_AUTO_REGIME_DRIFT: TW-IC 26 vs Global IC 17 — 信號強依賴近期資料
    → 市場 regime 可能已變化; 考慮 regime-gated feature weighting

    → Keep per-venue blockers explicitly visible on Dashboard, /lab, and /execution/status until credentials, order ack lifecycle, and fill lifecycle each have runtime-backed proof.
